releaseSummary: Added a module documentation index and PR guard to enforce code/doc companion updates.
CI PR checks now run doc symmetry validation as a required gate.
Exception handling now supports explicit rationale-backed overrides via bug exception files or PR metadata labels.

moduleImpact.notes: Updated as part of PR Doc Symmetry Guardrail.
Updated as part of PR Doc Symmetry Guardrail.
Updated as part of PR Doc Symmetry Guardrail.

migrationNotes: No manual data migration is required for this release.
